jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zebronics - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
